scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @desk/api" "npm run dev -w @desk/web"
scripts.dev:admin: concurrently -n api,admin -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @desk/api" "npm run dev -w @desk/admin"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,web,admin -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @desk/api" "npm run dev -w @desk/web" "npm run dev -w @desk/admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @desk/api && npm run build -w @desk/web && npm run build -w @desk/admin
